info.title: ArkAPI | Bitcoin-native Pay-per-call API Platform
info.description: Bitcoin-native pay-per-call API platform for developers and AI agents. Access security, OSINT, AI, and utility APIs anonymously using Signet Lightning and Ark. No API keys or accounts required.

tags.name: public
tags.description: Public discovery and session setup endpoints

endpoints.description: Higher-quality AI translation with style control
Check whether a domain allows DNS zone transfer
Generate an image and return a short-lived download URL

post.description: Creates a new Signet session and returns a bearer token plus Signet Lightning invoice and Signet Ark funding address.

402.description: Session exists but has insufficient or inactive balance

example.message: Binary PNG download returned on success; this path expires quickly.

post.description: Cost: 3 sats. Returns full, structured DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, SOA) for a domain as clean JSON. Optimized for AI agents and OSINT automation.
Cost: 12 sats. Tests whether authoritative nameservers permit AXFR and returns the exposed zone records only when zone transfer is enabled.

data.explanation: AXFR was not permitted by the checked authoritative nameservers, so no zone records were returned.

post.description: Cost: 5 sats. Returns cleanly parsed WHOIS registration data (registrar, dates, status) for a domain. Eliminates manual parsing of raw WHOIS output.
Cost: 5 sats. Returns certificate validity, issuer, protocol, and remaining lifetime.
Cost: 3 sats. Audits a public HTTP or HTTPS URL for security headers. Private, local, and reserved targets are rejected.
Cost: 3 sats. Returns current conditions and forecast by city or coordinates.
Cost: 3 sats. Returns country, region, city, ISP, org, and AS data for a public IP.
Cost: 4 sats. Returns email authentication posture and an A-F grade.
Cost: 2 sats. Aggregates recent Bitcoin-related headlines from free RSS feeds.

items.title: Bitcoin miners adjust to new hashprice reality

post.description: Cost: 100 sats. Anonymous AI chat with ArkAPI-managed inference. Limited to 5 requests per day per token.

example.prompt: How is Ark different from Lightning?

data.answer: Ark is a Bitcoin scaling design that lets users hold and transfer off-chain value through virtual outputs coordinated by an Ark server.

post.description: Cost: 25 sats. Premium AI translation with optional style control for more natural output than the utility translation endpoint.

example.text: Sous les etoiles, la riviere chante doucement.

data.text: Sous les etoiles, la riviere chante doucement.
data.translated_text: Under the stars, the river sings softly.

post.description: Cost: 3 sats. Self-hosted translation with source-language auto-detection and target language selection.
Cost: 25 sats. Returns a short-lived ArkAPI-hosted download URL for a generated image.
Cost: 15 sats. Returns a short-lived ArkAPI-hosted download URL for a rendered webpage screenshot.
Cost: 2 sats. Returns base64 and data URI output for a PNG QR code.
Cost: 3 sats. Validates a mainnet Bitcoin address and returns live on-chain balance data.
Cost: 4 sats. Searches the official NIST National Vulnerability Database (NVD) for CVEs by keyword or product version and returns ranked matches with severity and CVSS scores.
Cost: 4 sats. Searches Polymarket's public market index and returns normalized results for open markets only, including title, platform, probability, volume, and close time. Cached for 5 minutes.

results.title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $60,000 on March 26?

post.summary: Look up NVD CVE details by ID
post.description: Cost: 3 sats. Returns full NIST NVD severity, CVSS, CWE, KEV, and reference data for a specific CVE ID. Optimized for automated vulnerability scanning.

Cost: 25 sats. Returns an aggregated view of a domain including DNS, WHOIS, TLS certificate details, security headers, email authentication posture, parsed security.txt disclosure metadata, parsed robots.txt crawl metadata, improved tech fingerprinting, HTTP redirect and final-page behavior, CT-log subdomains, provider detection, light subdomain hints, findings, recommendations, resolved IP intelligence, and an optional AI summary when ai_summary is true. Cached for 1 hour.

findings: No major issues were detected from DNS, TLS, header, and email-auth checks.

ai_summary.answer: Example.com has a straightforward footprint with limited exposed infrastructure and no major issues detected in the sampled DNS, TLS, header, and mail-auth checks.

get.description: Cost: 1 sat. Returns current Bitcoin prices in 10 major fiat currencies. Optional query params: currency=CAD for one rate or currencies=USD,EUR,CAD for a subset. Data is cached for 60 seconds.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Optional single fiat currency code, for example CAD or USD.

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated list of fiat currency codes, for example USD,EUR,CAD.

post.description: Cost: 5 sats. Fetches a public URL and uses a Readability algorithm to extract the main content, returning it as clean Markdown. Ideal for AI agents and LLM context reduction.

data.title: Example Domain
data.markdown:
# Example Domain

This domain is for use in illustrative examples...

post.description: Cost: 3 sats. Real-time domain name availability check using WHOIS-based lookup. Supports major TLDs.

ai_summary.description: When true, append an AI-written summary of the domain report.
